title: Teeth Dweller
description: Adds the super scary teeth dweller into your world!
body:
# The Teeth Dweller
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1275914987591700501?label=join%20our%20discord&logo=discord&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/asFz88Ghj3)


This mod adds the super scary teeth dweller to your world! He is very hard to fight however so I suggest running!

# 🦗 How he Spawns

He usually spawns at night, away from the play and then will start following and then will eventually he will chase the player.

# 💻 Alpha

This mod is currently in alpha and will be continuously updated.
